case_title: AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY VS. ROMAN KNOP

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY PANFILO ARMAS--FORMAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS TO NOV-17-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY PANFILO ARMAS--FOREMAN. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL L. LAW. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY RE: CHANGING PRAYER AMOUNT AND DEFENDANT INFO. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2014 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-12-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "PARTIES AGREE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD ROM KON INC. AS THE SOLE DEFENDANT. ROM KON, INC. WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS. AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF, ROMAN KNOP, INC. IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY PANFILO ARMAS--FOREMAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,450.00 FILED BY AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT KNOP, ROMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$100) SERVED JUN-16-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KNOP, ROMAN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ROMAN KNOP BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-18-2014 AT 10:00 AM.
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,600.00 FILED BY AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT KNOP, ROMAN ROMKON INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -FEE FOR SERVICE $100.00- SERVED OCT-29-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KNOP, ROMAN
